kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:18080/ping path_url=/ping headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
GET Response : url=http://127.0.0.1:18080/ping status=200, reason=OK headers={'Content-Length': '4', 'Server': 'Crow/master', 'Connection': 'Keep-Alive'} body=pong

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:18080/chat path_url=/chat headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
GET Response : url=http://127.0.0.1:18080/chat status=200, reason=OK headers={'Content-Length': '19', 'Server': 'Crow/master', 'Connection': 'Keep-Alive'} body=Le chat dit: miaou!

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.name: Test Register User

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:18080/register path_url=/register headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '40', 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'} body=username=testuser_robot&password=test123
POST Response : url=http://127.0.0.1:18080/register status=404, reason=Not Found headers={'Content-Length': '15', 'Server': 'Crow/master', 'Connection': 'Keep-Alive'} body=404 Not Found
HTTPError: 404 Client Error: Not Found for url: http://127.0.0.1:18080/register
kw.status: HTTPError: 404 Client Error: Not Found for url: http://127.0.0.1:18080/register

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.status: HTTPError: 404 Client Error: Not Found for url: http://127.0.0.1:18080/register
